indicators.name: large window with view of ocean
indicators.rationale: A large window with a view of the ocean allows natural light and a calming sea view, which can enhance sleep quality.

indicators.name: soaking tub near window
indicators.rationale: A soaking tub near the window can be a source of noise and disturbance, potentially disrupting sleep.

indicators.name: white chair near window
indicators.rationale: A white chair near the window can be a source of noise and distraction, potentially disrupting sleep.

indicators.name: plants in pots
indicators.rationale: Plants in pots can improve air quality and provide a calming presence, which can support sleep.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring can be noisy and cold, which can disrupt sleep.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: Low lighting can help create a calm and relaxing atmosphere conducive to sleep.

reasoning_summary: The scene is well-suited for sleep (Primary) with a large window providing natural light and a calming view of the ocean. However, the presence of a soaking tub and chairs near the window could be sources of noise and distraction, while the hardwood flooring and low lighting contribute to a more suitable sleep environment.
